sections.heading: Extension Prompt Pack
sections.prose:
- Scope: extension UX, browser compatibility, auth/session handling.
- Core prompt: Improve extension workflow with robust fallback behavior and telemetry.
- Small tasks: popup/content-script audit -> patch UX -> test flows -> release checklist.
